title: Kash Patel fires FBI agents with Iran expertise days before Tehran strike, also ousts members who investigated Trump: Report
summary_full: FBI Director Kash Patel reportedly fired a dozen agents from an elite counter-espionage unit, CI-12, which specializes in threats from Iran. These firings occurred amid an investigation into Donald Trump's handling of classified documents and shortly before Trump launched bombing strikes on Iran.
